notes: v0.16.75 — Mini-bosses + OVERLOAD GRID overhaul. (A) MINI-BOSS HP roughly doubled vs v0.16.74: turret × 2.8, rail × 2.9, queen × 2.6, splitter × 3.2. On NORMAL each archetype now lives ~13–20 s instead of dying in 5. (B) TURRET CORE significantly harder: 5 → 7 bullets per arm in phase 2, fire cadence 0.45 s → 0.30 s, bullets switched to spawn_big_bullet with 4.5 s lifetime so they actually reach the player. New SHOCKWAVE RING attack every 3.5 s (2.0 s in phase 2): expanding damaging band, 95 dps if you clip it — you can't camp close anymore. (C) OVERLOAD GRID redesigned: generators NEVER disappear after overload. When max heat hits, the generator turns IMMORTAL (red-purple body, locked padlock ring) and keeps firing at max-heat cadence FOR THE REST OF THE ENCOUNTER. A replacement heatable generator spawns at a random arena position so the heatable count stays at 6. The arena fills with permanent threats — you have to win before it becomes too much. (D) OVERLOAD bullet lifetime 3.0 s → 8.0 s so projectiles cross the whole arena. Windows only.
